detail.noReorderRules: No reorder rules configured. Add rules per warehouse to enable low stock alerts.

deactivate.title: Deactivate product?
deactivate.description: The product will be inactive and unavailable for new operations. Do you want to continue?

activate.title: Activate product?
activate.description: The product will be active and available for new operations. Do you want to continue?

deactivate.description: The warehouse will become inactive and unavailable for new operations. Do you want to continue?

activate.title: Activate warehouse?
activate.description: The warehouse will become active and available for operations again. Do you want to continue?

movements.title: Stock Movements
movements.description: Track inventory entries, exits, and adjustments

empty.title: No movements yet
empty.description: Stock movements will appear here once you start recording inventory changes.

form.createDescription: Enter the details to record a new inventory movement
form.editDescription: Update the details of this draft movement
form.error: An error occurred while recording the movement.
form.updateError: An error occurred while updating the movement.

toast.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

confirmDelete.title: Delete Movement
confirmDelete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this movement? This action cannot be undone.

confirmPost.title: Post Movement
confirmPost.description: Are you sure you want to post this movement? This will update the stock levels and cannot be undone.

confirmVoid.title: Void Movement
confirmVoid.description: Are you sure you want to void this movement? This will reverse the stock changes.

detail.title: Movement Details
detail.subtitle: Movement #{id}
detail.notFoundDescription: The movement you are looking for does not exist or has been deleted.

detail.title: Transfer Details
detail.subtitle: Transfer #{id}

empty.description: Get started by creating your first stock transfer.

form.error: An error occurred while creating the transfer.

receive.title: Confirm Receipt
receive.description: Enter the actual quantities received per product.

empty.title: No sales yet
empty.description: Get started by creating your first sale.

form.createDescription: Enter the details to create a new sale order
form.error: An error occurred while creating the sale.

timeline.confirmedDescription: Sale confirmed, stock deducted from warehouse
timeline.pickingDescription: Items are being picked from the warehouse
timeline.shippedDescription: Sale has been shipped to the customer
timeline.completedDescription: Sale is fully completed, no further action needed
timeline.returnedDescription: Sale has been returned by the customer

confirmSale.title: Confirm Sale
confirmSale.description: Are you sure you want to confirm this sale? This will deduct the stock from the warehouse and cannot be undone.

startPicking.title: Start Picking
startPicking.description: Are you sure you want to start picking for this sale? The sale status will change to PICKING.

shipSale.title: Ship Sale
shipSale.description: Enter shipping details for this sale. The sale status will change to SHIPPED.

completeSale.title: Complete Sale
completeSale.description: Are you sure you want to mark this sale as completed? This indicates the customer has received the order and no further action is needed.

cancelSale.title: Cancel Sale
cancelSale.description: Are you sure you want to cancel this sale? If confirmed, stock will be returned to the warehouse.

returns.description: Process product returns from customers and to suppliers

form.createDescription: Enter the details to process a product return
form.saleProductsHint: Products were loaded from the selected sale. You can adjust quantities and remove items you don't want to return.
form.movementProductsHint: Products were loaded from the selected movement. You can adjust quantities and remove items you don't want to return.
form.error: An error occurred while creating the return.

confirmReturn.title: Confirm Return
confirmReturn.description: Are you sure you want to confirm this return? This will update inventory levels accordingly.

cancelReturn.title: Cancel Return
cancelReturn.description: Are you sure you want to cancel this return? If confirmed, inventory changes will be reversed.

reports.description: Generate and export business intelligence reports
reports.noData: No data available for this report

types.AVAILABLE_INVENTORY_desc: Current stock levels by product, warehouse, and location
types.MOVEMENT_HISTORY_desc: Detailed history of all inventory entries, exits, and adjustments
types.VALUATION_desc: Total inventory value using weighted average cost (WAC)
types.LOW_STOCK_desc: Products below minimum stock with criticality levels
types.MOVEMENTS_desc: Aggregated movement statistics by type and warehouse
types.FINANCIAL_desc: Revenue, costs, and gross margins by period and warehouse
types.TURNOVER_desc: Stock rotation analysis and days of inventory on hand
types.SALES_desc: Sales summary by period with revenue and order counts
types.SALES_BY_PRODUCT_desc: Detailed sales analysis broken down by product
types.RETURNS_desc: Summary of all product returns and their status
types.RETURNS_BY_TYPE_desc: Analysis of customer vs. supplier returns
types.RETURNS_BY_PRODUCT_desc: Return rates and trends broken down by product
types.RETURNS_CUSTOMER_desc: Returns received from customers with full details
types.RETURNS_SUPPLIER_desc: Returns sent back to suppliers with full details
types.ABC_ANALYSIS_desc: Pareto classification of products by revenue contribution (A/B/C)
types.DEAD_STOCK_desc: Products with stock on hand but no sales in a configurable period

empty.description: No activity has been recorded yet
